# Security policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report security vulnerabilities **privately** — do not open a public issue.

- Use GitHub's
  [private vulnerability reporting](https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/security-advisories/guidance-on-reporting-and-writing-information-about-vulnerabilities/privately-reporting-a-security-vulnerability)
  for this repository, **or**
- email `REPLACE_WITH_SECURITY_CONTACT` (replace with your real security contact).

Include a description, reproduction steps, affected versions, and any potential impact. We aim to acknowledge reports
within **REPLACE_WITH_SLA** business days.

## Supported versions

Document which versions receive security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| ------- | --------- |
| latest  | yes       |

## Disclosure

We follow coordinated disclosure: we will work with you on a fix and a disclosure timeline before any public
announcement.
